commands.name: install
commands.description: Installs the kernel into the consumer repository: templates, config, agents, skills, scripts, CI.

commands.name: init
commands.description: Initializes harness state in an already-installed repository (bus, audit, organism directories).

commands.name: update
commands.description: Updates the kernel files without re-running discovery.

commands.name: doctor
commands.description: Diagnoses the installation: kernel integrity, schemas, config, structure.

commands.name: sync-check
commands.description: Runs all gates locally, exactly as CI runs them.

commands.name: domain sync
commands.description: Materializes approved domain candidates into explicit contracts.

commands.name: export-graph
commands.description: Derives the agent graph from manifests.

commands.name: validate-runtime
commands.description: Verifies the runtime environment: PowerShell version, git, optional tools.

commands.name: discover
commands.description: Observes stack, frameworks, structure and directories; proposes domains and specialists.

commands.name: organism bootstrap
commands.description: Creates the organism state from current contracts: cells, tissues, bus topics.

commands.name: organism status
commands.description: Shows live state: active cells, recent signals, gate results, drift.

commands.name: organism signal
commands.description: Appends a typed event to the bus.

commands.name: evolve
commands.description: Analyzes ledger, signals and telemetry; proposes improvements for human selection.

commands.name: regenerate
commands.description: Updates kernel, re-runs discovery, syncs domains, regenerates graphs, validates.
